messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.boundary-substitution.enterprise-gpu-busbar-half-refuted","queries":[{"query":"NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 reference architecture DC busbar power distribution rack PDU","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"2026 enterprise GPU pod deployment rack PDU attach rate integrator BOM","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"enterprise on-premise data center capacity share decline 2031 forecast","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.boundary-substitution.colo-spec-contagion-from-hyperscale-tenants","queries":[{"query":"CBRE European colocation take-up hyperscaler AI HPC tenant demand 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Frankfurt Amsterdam wholesale colocation prelease fit-out rack PDU specification 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"wholesale colocation busway power shelf architecture hyperscale tenant spec Europe","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.boundary-substitution.ce7-hyperscale-mix-mirage","queries":[{"query":"Synergy Research global hyperscale data center capacity share 48 percent 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"CBRE Central Europe CE-7 hyperscale operator capacity MW share 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Europe hyperscale self-build capacity Ireland Netherlands Sweden Belgium share of total","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.boundary-substitution.intelligent-subset-scope-mismatch","queries":[{"query":"IndexBox EU Intelligent Rack PDUs market report revenue share","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Omdia rack PDU tracker intelligent managed unit share of revenue Europe","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"IndexBox Rack PDU Europe market report versus Intelligent Rack PDU report scope","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.boundary-substitution.nl-selfbuild-hollows-second-geography","queries":[{"query":"Dutch Data Center Association Netherlands colocation capacity report 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Netherlands hyperscale self-build campus rack PDU procurement channel 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Amsterdam data center supply constraint moratorium colocation capacity 2025","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
